channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: AI agents need human loop: cost, trust, and the 78%
item.description: Cut failed AI agent actions 85% with a review queue — latency, cost, and the 78% trap most teams miss until production breaks.

item.title: SaaS niche in 2026: pick a sliver no LLM can eat
item.description: Pick a SaaS niche in 2026 that no LLM can eat — we cut churn 63% by focusing on vendor cleanup for Kenyan manufacturers. Benchmarks, infra costs, and the CLI-first approach that worked.

item.title: Build a static analyzer in 14 days with Tree-sitter
item.description: Cut static analysis runtime 7.9× with Tree-sitter 0.22.6 — parse 1.2M lines in 18 ms median, enforce policy in pre-commit hooks, and drop CI queue time 85 %.

item.title: Edge backends: when 50 locations break your API
item.description: Latency drops from 200 ms to 15 ms for 90% of users, but suddenly you’re debugging cache stampedes at 3 AM because everyone hit the same stale endpoint.

item.title: 9 AI wrapper plays that worked in 2026
item.description: 9 AI wrapper businesses survived 2026 — the ones that got pricing right made $12M ARR, the rest died. Find the exact model that fits your assets and start charging today.

item.title: Meet 2026 SBOM requirements in 30 mins
item.description: Cut release cycles 2 days by auto-generating signed SBOMs in 110 s — Syft 1.14 + Cosign 2.2 walkthrough for regulated startups

item.title: LLM latency: 3 patterns that never lie
item.description: Cut LLM p99 latency 87% with 3 patterns: token shaping, isolated pools, and cache-as-queue — connection pool tuning, Redis 7.2 eviction, and the cache stampede mistake most teams miss.

item.title: AI incident response: when it helps and when it burns
item.description: Cut oncall time 20% with the right AI incident tool — triage vs root-cause agents, with benchmark data and real screw-ups from 2026.

item.title: Regulators broke our API design
item.description: Cut API response time 60% and failed transactions 80% by switching from REST+JSON to binary protocols and offline queues. Real-world data from Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya in 2026.

item.title: AI ops: Datadog vs Granfa for infra automation
item.description: Cut cloud costs 61% and reduce incident response time 40% with the right AI ops tool — Datadog vs Granfa in 2026 benchmarks, real runbooks, and the resize loop mistake I made.

item.title: PWAs hit parity in 2026
item.description: Cut page weight 70% and cut server costs to zero with 2026 PWA APIs — Periodic Background Sync and File System Access finally work everywhere. Real production numbers included.

item.title: Platforms at 10, 100, 1k devs: the real stack
item.description: Platform cost per developer dropped 35% with quotas and Redis 7.2 — the real stack sizes, quotas, and failure modes in 2026.

item.title: 3 IaC tools in 2026: which one bites you first
item.description: Cut plan/apply time 23% with Pulumi in 2026 — benchmark results, state recovery times, and the real latency numbers every team should measure first.

item.title: AI memory loss: why your agent forgets everything
item.description: Cut AI context loss overnight by 90% with PostgreSQL memory store — 12 ms fetch latency, $18/month cost, and the session ID format that prevents forgetting in 2026.

item.title: Test AI code without testing the AI: 9 hard rules
item.description: Cut test flakiness 78% with property-based tests — Python 3.11, Hypothesis 6.94, and the property-first rule to avoid testing AI outputs

item.title: pgvector cut costs 80%: ditching Pinecone
item.description: Cut pgvector monthly costs 80% vs Pinecone — real benchmarks, schema, and the schema mistake I made first try. Compare latency, cost, and ops for 10M vectors in 2026.

item.title: AI SaaS solo: Builder vs Boilerplate in 2026
item.description: Cut SaaS time-to-market 50% with AI — Builder vs Boilerplate 2026: latency, cost, and the plugin trap most founders miss.

item.title: Serverless DB cold starts: Neon, PlanetScale, Turso
item.description: Cut serverless database latency 75% with Neon, PlanetScale, Turso — real 2026 numbers, connection pooling, DNS pinning, and the $32 VPC mistake most teams miss.

item.title: 3 side gigs developers use for $1.2k/mo in 2026
item.description: 3 side gigs developers use for $1.2k/month in Nairobi 2026 — Freelance APIs, code audits, AI fine-tuning — with concrete tools, benchmarks, and first-week steps

item.title: AI sales cycle: what changed for devtool founders
item.description: Trial-to-paid conversion fell 64% in 2025 — here’s how a devtool founder rebuilt the sales cycle around AI-native expectations and cut the cycle from 8 weeks to 3 weeks
